CITATION MODES REFERENCE

This document exercises citation modes using sample bibliography entries.

PARENTHETICAL CITATIONS
- Single: (Knuth 1984)
- Multiple: (Knuth 1984; Lamport 1994)
- With prefix/suffix: (see Knuth 1984, p. 42)

NARRATIVE CITATIONS
- Single: Knuth (1984) says TeX is a typesetting system.
- Multiple: Knuth (1984) and Lamport (1994) discuss document preparation.

YEAR-ONLY / SUPPRESS AUTHOR
- Year-only: 1984
- Suppress author: 1984

MIXED TYPES
- Conference: (Miller and Chen 2023)
- Thesis: (Garcia 2022)
- Report: (Lee 2021)
- Web: (Singh 2024)
